_comment: Manual contract overrides. Keys are NHL player_id (string). These ALWAYS win over the database.

8478550._note: Artemi Panarin — 7yr $11.642M deal expires end of 2025-26 (UFA); scraper grabbed his 2yr extension starting 2026-27 instead of current-season contract

8480012._note: Elias Pettersson (C, born 1998) — 8yr $11.6M deal 2023-24 through 2030-31; slug elias-pettersson → wrong Pettersson (D born 2004); scraper misses the C

8482175._note: JJ Peterka — NHL API stores first name as 'JJ' (legal: John-Jason), slug jj-peterka → 404; correct slug john-jason-peterka confirmed $7.7M 5yr UFA 2030

8477960._note: Kempe current bridge deal $5.5M/yr — scraper grabbed his 2026-27 extension instead

8482730._note: Clarke — puckpedia sidebar pp-ufa widget triggered UFA; he is RFA on expiry

8484801._note: Celebrini — same sidebar pp-ufa issue; he is RFA on expiry
